news.title: Where we've been. Where we're headed. at Consensus yesterday. When you think of OpenSea, the first thing that comes to mind is NFTs, but now when you think of OpenSea, you think of Perps, meme tokens, NFTs, swaps, bridges, and it doesn't get any better than this.

OpenSea Where we've been. Where we're headed. @HollanderAdam with @CoinDesk at Consensus yesterday. cooking with social features  New follower push notifications in the app… we’re so back You should try the beta Zack Brenner

Looks like @opensea Mobile beta testers are are starting to discover some upcoming social features on the app all your nfts, major crypto, memecoins & perps positions. across all your wallets on 26 chains. all in one portfolio, right in your pocket. onboard in under a minute. pay for anything, with anything, no bridging required. true non-custodial ownership.

6529 ~1 month old  Some of you know me from somewhere else  My views on NFTs in the thread below 1/ On How Short Life Is A few years ago, I was walking around in a blizzard in SoHo (New York). It was late, midnight, and it was beautiful. Some friends, about 15 blocks away, called: "come over?" It was late, it was cold, was tired, thought "maybe not worth it" but then... 1/ There are no other const...
“highly advanced exploit by the most elite hackers on earth” they stored their seedphrases in a PASSWORD MANAGER lmao Lose it all you morons

Keys were stored in a password manager accessible to a small number of people to handle chain maintenance and upgrades, without an additional encryption layer separate from the password manager. ! Below are the facts & my conclusion  RT to spread awareness Read on ... Two 20 year old NFT rugpullers getting charged with...
